src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.general_idea: Add Javadoc comment block with author attribution to the main application class.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.human_impl: Added /** @Autor Nidhal Naffati */ before the class declaration.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.general_idea: Normalize code indentation from tabs to spaces to comply with standard Java formatting conventions.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.human_impl: Changed leading tabs in main method to spaces.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Add Hibernate validation annotations to enforce data integrity rules on entity fields.
Enforce non-nullability on primitive-like fields using Jakarta validation annotations.
Switch from AUTO generation to explicit SEQUENCE generation for better database compatibility and control.
Change ID type from primitive long to Long object to support nullability and standard JPA practices.
Define unique and nullable constraints explicitly on the registration number column.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.human_impl: @Column(unique = true, nullable = false) private int registrationNumber;

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Map string-based enums to database columns using EnumType.STRING for readability.
Establish a ManyToOne relationship with Dealer entity including join column configuration.
Prevent infinite recursion during JSON serialization by marking the back-reference.
Enable builder pattern support for the entity class using Lombok.
Define specific enum types for Car attributes like Model, Gear, and Fuel.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.4 to 3.2.1 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new com.mysql:mysql-connector-j required for Spring Boot 3.
Switch from explicit jakarta.validation-api to spring-boot-starter-validation to handle Jakarta namespace migration.
Add Flyway MySQL dependency for database migration management.
Add Flyway Maven plugin to execute database migrations during the build process.
Add Jackson JSR310 datatype support for Java 8+ date/time API serialization.
Add Spring Boot Mail starter dependency for email functionality.
Explicitly add JUnit Jupiter dependency for modern testing support.
Add JUnit 4 dependency, likely for legacy test compatibility or specific vintage engine needs.
Add Spring Context Support dependency, often needed for specific mail or resource handling utilities.
Remove Thymeleaf starter as the project appears to be moving towards a pure REST API approach.
Update the project artifact version from snapshot to a release version.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Updated the database connection URL to use a cleaner schema name and removed legacy JDBC parameters.
Removed unnecessary quotes from the database password configuration.
Changed Hibernate DDL auto strategy from 'update' to 'validate' to enforce schema consistency with migrations.
Switched Hibernate dialect from MySQL8Dialect to the generic MySQLDialect.
Enabled SQL formatting in Hibernate properties for better readability in logs.
Removed Thymeleaf configuration block as it is no longer used or required.
Added Flyway configuration to manage database migrations explicitly.
Configured the server to exclude stack traces from error responses for security and cleanliness.
